name: Codex Repo Digest
description: A read-only Codex run that summarizes a repository into a Markdown digest on a schedule. The final digest and full run stream are captured separately.

parameters.label: Repository path
parameters.help: Absolute path to the local git repository.

parameters.label: Digest prompt
parameters.default: Summarize the notable changes, open TODOs, and anything that looks risky in this repository into a concise Markdown digest.
parameters.help: What to summarize. This template runs Codex in a read-only sandbox. Avoid single quotes.

parameters.label: Report file path
parameters.help: Where the Markdown digest is written.

parameters.label: Log file path
parameters.help: Where the full run stream is captured for review.
